description: Comprehensive UI/UX overhaul for the MASH e-commerce platform. Elevate from functional MVP (6.7/10) to polished, conversion-optimized, accessible marketplace (9/10). Covers design system cleanup, mobile navigation fixes, SEO foundation, accessibility, shopping experience, checkout redesign, visual polish, and performance optimization.
currentPhase: COMPLETE - All Phases Finished + Phase 6 Homepage Refinement

successMetrics.build: npm run build passes with zero errors
successMetrics.tests: All test suites pass with 0 failures
successMetrics.lint: npm run lint passes with zero warnings
successMetrics.typecheck: npx tsc --noEmit passes with zero errors in src/
successMetrics.noFileOver300Lines: No single page/component file exceeds 300 lines (after Phase 3)

afterStory: Update prd-ui-ux.json: set story passes=true, add completedAt timestamp
Update completedStories count in this file
Update lastUpdated timestamp in this file

progressLog.summary: Changed mobile sheet Cart link href from /checkout to /cart
Added ShoppingCart icon with cart count badge as 5th nav item between Shop and Growers. Removed unused Bell import. Integrated useCart context.
Removed hardcoded font-['Roboto'] from footer element; inherits font-sans from theme
Replaced emoji badges with Lucide icons: Sparkles (New), Leaf (Organic), Droplets (Fresh). Added flex+gap layout to New badge span.
Removed all emoji from sort SelectItem labels: Featured First, Newest Arrivals, Price Low/High, Name A-Z
Removed artificial 300ms setTimeout delay in handleAddToCart. Cart action is now immediate.
Updated loading/error/no-slides states from h-[300px] to min-h-[400px] (matching content slides) to eliminate CLS

Fixed primary color from near-black oklch(0.205 0 0) to green oklch(0.462 0.141 145.2). Added --primary-hover, --primary-light, --primary-dark vars. Updated dark mode primary to lighter green. Removed duplicate hardcoded color overrides from @theme inline.

Replaced 7 hardcoded color instances across 3 files: fill-gray-200->fill-muted (stars), bg-gray-100->bg-muted (sold-out btn), bg-gray-100->bg-muted (hero error), text-red-600->text-destructive (hero error), bg-white dark:bg-gray-800->bg-card, border-gray-*->border-border, border-gray-300->border-muted-foreground (checkout vendor selector)
Added skip-to-content link as first child before Header with sr-only focus:not-sr-only pattern. Added id=main-content and tabIndex=-1 to main element.

Added aria-label=Main Navigation to desktop nav, aria-label=Mobile Navigation to mobile sheet nav and bottom nav, aria-label=Footer Navigation to footer nav wrapper, role=status aria-live=polite to announcement bar, role=contentinfo to footer.
Added aria-label to product card root (name + price + unit), aria-label=Add {name} to cart on add-to-cart button. Wishlist button already had aria-label.
Created reusable JsonLd component with script type=application/ld+json. Added typed helpers: productJsonLd(), breadcrumbJsonLd(), organizationJsonLd(). Schema.org compliant with PHP currency.
Split shop page into server wrapper (page.tsx with generateMetadata) + ShopClient.tsx client component. Metadata includes title, description, openGraph, canonical URL.

Split product detail page into server wrapper with generateMetadata (fetches product from Sanity for title/description/openGraph) + ProductDetailClient.tsx. Added Product JSON-LD and BreadcrumbList JSON-LD structured data.

Created SocialLinks component with 3 variants (header/mobile/footer). PLATFORMS array + VARIANT_CONFIG for size/style differences. Replaced ~130 lines of duplicated social link blocks in header (desktop + mobile sheet) and footer with single component calls. Removed unused individual social icon imports.

Replaced 'Secure checkout powered by Firebase' text with trust badge row: Lock + Secure Checkout, ShieldCheck + Buyer Protection, Truck + Fast Delivery. Uses text-muted-foreground flex layout centered below checkout button.

Added free shipping progress bar above order summary. Threshold P500. Shows remaining amount with partially filled bg-primary bar or 'You qualify for free delivery!' with CheckCircle when met. Uses bg-muted track.

Created BackToTop component with fixed bottom-right position (bottom-20 mobile, lg:bottom-6). Shows after 1vh scroll with fade animation. Smooth scroll to top with ChevronUp icon. Added to client-layout.tsx after MobileBottomNav.

Created FilterSidebar component with variant prop (desktop/mobile). Extracted ~300 lines of duplicated filter logic (categories, price range, tags) from ShopClient. Desktop variant shows product counts per category; mobile variant uses mobile- id prefix. Removed unused Checkbox, Label, Slider imports from ShopClient.

Created StickyAddToCartBar component with IntersectionObserver-based visibility. Fixed bottom-16 (above MobileBottomNav), lg:hidden. Shows product name, price, quantity controls, compact Add button. Wired into ProductDetailClient with useRef on quantity div.

Created CrossSell component using useSanityFeaturedProducts hook. Filters out cart items by ID, renders ProductCard grid (2/3/4 cols responsive). Loading skeleton and empty state handling. Wired into cart page below main grid.
Created PaymentLogos component with PAYMENT_METHODS array (GCash, Maya, Visa, Mastercard) using Next.js Image. Grayscale-to-color hover effect. COD text badge. Rendered above copyright bar in footer.

Created NewsletterSignup component with Zod email validation, dynamic Firestore import for newsletter_subscribers collection, duplicate email check. bg-primary section with Mail icon. Rendered after TestimonialsSection on homepage.

Created HowItWorks component with 3-step visual guide (Browse/Cart/Delivered). Desktop horizontal connecting line, mobile vertical arrows. Number badges on step circles. Rendered between FeaturedCategories and WhyMASH on homepage.

Removed StatsBar component (1000+ Products, 50+ Local Farms, etc.) and NewsletterSignup from homepage. Cleaned up unused imports (Package, Users, Star, Truck, NewsletterSignup). Simplified Home component render tree.

Comprehensive homepage UI refinement: removed all gradient backgrounds, replaced with solid bg-muted/20 and bg-background. Cleaner SectionHeader with border badges. Improved spacing consistency (py-16/20/28). Replaced gradient overlay on CategoryCard with flat bg-black/40. Simplified GrowerCard with bg-primary/10 fallback instead of gradient. Removed decorative blur orbs. Added line-clamp-2 to grower descriptions.

Replaced emoji pin icon with MapPin Lucide icon for testimonial locations. Added Testimonials badge and accent line to section header. Added aria-label to pagination dots for accessibility. Improved View All Reviews button with consistent border-2 hover styling.
